subcodes.first_line: The petition of this evanescent one before the Afnán of the divine Lote-Tree - may my spirit be sacrificed for their love - is that the blessed leaf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض این فانی خدمت افنان سدره ربانی روحی لحبهم الفداء آنکه ورقه مبارکه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
